rationale: Although the domains differ (music success vs. orange-juice brand competition), the cited 2004 paper’s core contribution is a Bayesian framework with Dirichlet process priors, which directly overlaps with the citing paper’s use of supervised hierarchical Dirichlet process methods. Given this plausible methodological/foundational linkage and only DOI-level match evidence (without context to show it is merely incidental), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
